body: {"schema_version":"x07.mcp.tools_manifest@0.2.0","tools":[{"name":"echo","description":"Echo back the provided text through the sandboxed worker capsule.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"text":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":4096}},"required":["text"],"additionalProperties":false},"x07":{"impl":"mcp.user.call_tool_v1","limits_profile":"mcp_tool_fast_v1"}}]}
